name: pincode-explorer-root
description: Root package.json to manage frontend and backend

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend --omit=dev && npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix backend"
